title: DX opens distribution center in Kettering
summary:
DX has opened a new distribution center in Kettering, UK, as part of its ongoing investment program to expand capacity and support growth across its operations.

The facility, situated on a 28,000m2 site at Kettering Venture Park, will support the company’s fulfillment, freight and last-mile services, increasing capacity in the East Midlands and strengthening the company’s national distribution network.

The site comprises an 8,000m2 building, including 7,400m2 of warehouse space, along with office space.

Continue reading DX opens distribution center in Kettering at Parcel and Postal Technology International.
